description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure is surrounded by a paved courtyard and features a prominent front staircase leading to the main entrance. The property includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, outdoor lounge furniture, and landscaped greenery along the perimeter. Multiple large windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is enclosed within a low boundary wall, and the driveway is lined with decorative trees. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on functionality and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a front staircase, and a backyard pool, surrounded by paved and landscaped areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a staircase, large windows, and a paved driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, outdoor lounge area, and decorative trees along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio furniture, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, entry path, and landscaping with trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide staircase, double doors, and a minimal overhang, with no porch or columns.
